Explanation: I agree with the other agents. The evidence from [127], [39664], and [77626] confirms that the 2016 exhibition "Poland — a Country of Folklore?" at Zachęta — National Gallery of Art, Warsaw, was accompanied by a digital book edited by Joanna Kordjak, who specializes in 20th-century Polish post-war art and worked at a contemporary art museum in Warsaw as of 2020. The publication is a collection of texts and photographs, and one author references "Przygoda na Mariensztacie," the first full-color Polish film, matching all the clues.
Exact Answer: Poland — a Country of Folklore? (Zachęta — National Gallery of Art, Warsaw, 2016)
Confidence: 98%
